allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('instagram'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('twitter'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('youtube'\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('lucide-react'\).then\(m => { const keys = Object.keys\(m\).filter\(k => /[Ii]nsta|[Tt]witt|[Yy]outu/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\) || 'none found'\); console.log\('---'\); const keys2 = Object.keys\(m\).filter\(k => /[Gg]lobe|[Ll]ink|[Mm]ail|[Ss]end/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(keys2.slice\(0,10\).join\('\\n'\)\) }\)")
